title: ThTQ-Create
description: A Server-Modpack with focus on the Create mod with additional Structures and addons for Create
body:
A Create-focused Modpack for my Server with several Addons for create and new Structures, Biomes and more.

This Modpack adds better wold generation for the Overworld, the Nether and the End with Terralith, Incedium and Nullscape. Also there are more beautiful and realistic Clouds, alswell as trees, that also cut down more realistic.

Structures are added or replaced, that are now more impressive and interactive. These Structures have stories, puzzles and mechanics, that are added by Create and Quark with the integrated Mods Series by craisinlord.

The main focus of this Modpack is the Create mod with it's addons. It adds a ton of possibilities for automation and something everyone loves...Trains. With the addons, the automation and the trains have many additional parts and more things to automate.

To top this off, this Modpack adds many decoration blocks, furniture, bridges, roofs, doors and so on. there is much room for creativity and the possibility to build a factory or a whole city of your desire.
